name: Lebanese Cabbage Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned tomatoes or 1 can Tomato paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash rice and drain.
2. Add meat and 1 cup canned tomatoes or 1/2 can tomato paste to the rice.
3. Add salt, pepper, and spices. This is the filling.
4. Separate cabbage leaves and drop them in salted boiling water. Cook until limp.
5. Cook all leaves thoroughly and let drain.
6. Trim leaves of heavy stems. Reserve stems for the saucepan's bottom.
7. On each leaf, place 1 heaping tablespoon (tbsp) of filling.
8. Roll firmly, placing cabbage rolls neatly in rows with several layers.
9. Add garlic buds among leaves as you roll.
10. Place 1 cup canned tomatoes and enough hot water to cover the rolls.
11. Sprinkle 1/2 tsp salt over all.
12. Cook for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
13. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, add the juice of 2 lemons.
